reviews.review_description: This was exactly what I was looking for, but I deducted one star because the stories should be longer. You just get into it, then it’s over…also, some stories are blurry, could be me, but it should be crisper…All that said, with some improvements it would be a 5 star…

developer_response.body: Thank you for the thoughtful and honest review, GoldSpiderMonkey1872. I really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience, and I am glad the app was what you were looking for overall. Thanks again for watching and for your support.

reviews.review_title: Really not worth it and really not scary
reviews.review_description: Unless you’re 5 years old maybe. Not even a good experience in VR. Cheap low cost filming

I 'm not a gamer so I love the fact that I don't have to solve any puzzle or go through a whole bunch of levels before being scared. Nice short stories with good sound. I love these kinds of passive experiences!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re really happy to hear you enjoyed the short stories. We wanted it to be something easy to dive into and enjoy without too much effort. Whether it’s for a scare, a laugh, or just a good time, we’re glad you’re part of the journey. Thanks again for sharing your experience! Enjoy the ride!

reviews.review_description:
Watched 6 of them so far not even got a sweat on or s*** myself 
Don't know why this is so hyped up..

I think people really need to watch some really horror...

No impressed so far give it time that's if I don't fall asleep though boredom

developer_response.body: We understand that horror is subjective, and everyone has different expectations when it comes to fear. Most of our viewers find 'VR Horror Stories" very scary, while a few don’t at all. VR Horror Stories is designed to build tension through both visuals and immersive 3D sound, which plays a key role in the scares. For the best experience, we highly recommend watching in a quiet, dark space with headphones to fully feel the atmosphere. We appreciate you giving it a try, and we hope some of the stories bring the chills you're looking for.

reviews.review_description: The stories wasn't long enough and they make you sleepy

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear it didn’t meet your expectations. VR Horror Stories was designed as a collection of short-form experiences with a focus on atmosphere and immersive sound. Some users enjoy the slower, eerie build-ups, others prefer more fast-paced horror, and we understand that! Thank you for giving it a try.
Thank you pmak11, your review is highly appreciated!

reviews.review_title: Well made, but maybe not for me.
reviews.review_description:
The experience looks and generally sounds great, but as an experience it's lacking for me. None of the 1 to 2 minute videos have been scary, which isvdoubled by the fact that you are never tense because you know you can't be hurt or killed in-game as with a full horror game, which leaves me just kind of staring into space waiting for the 3rd jump scare to start and end after failing to elicit any reaction from me.
Since there is also literally zero actual story attached to blanky watching the 360 videos trying to be scary, I'm finding reason to keep this title a bit hard.
I know if I watch through all 17 videos, I'll have no reason to go back again when I have so many other horror titles that keep me searching, surviving (making me feel SOMETHING), and even getting a story told in a manner that lasts more than 2 minutes at a time.

This is just me though, as a game like Dreadhalls and The Exorcist Legion VR don't scare me, but they are also highly interactive to make up for that.
 I could see this scaring/ creeping out younger kids and more easily scared adults, so I'll rate no lower than 3 Stars, because it's still shows signs of a fine piece of work as a VR horror game lover. So I'd hope for more content to keep coming if I did decide to keep it, but 45 minutes of content for the budget price isn't terrible if you know exactly what it is you're getting.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We appreciate your perspective and understand that *VR Horror Stories* does not offer the level of interactivity some users look for in horror experiences. As a passive 360° video experience with a focus on immersive visuals and spatial audio, our aim is to create an atmospheric journey rather than an interactive one. Horror is subjective— Many viewers find our horror videos very scary, a few find them not so scary, and some even laugh (Especially in Party Chat groups).  Our main goal is to evoke emotion, but we definitely understand that the experience may not appeal to avid gamers. We’re grateful for your recognition of the work that went into creating it!

reviews.review_description:
Always wanted to experience a horror scene or horror game but you’re not quite ready to take the plunge?? 

This is your App!! 

With it being an “Experience” and not a game, it’s absolutely brilliant, no weapons or the ability to run!! Your fate is in the hands of the Director!! 😅

You sit back and wait for your “white knuckle ride” to commence, with real to life spooky surroundings and environments you never know what waiting for you around the corner, behind the door 🚪 or in the shadows! In this immersive selection of 17 different 360 Videos! 

Features a pause button by hitting your trigger a “breather space” if you like if at any point you feel it’s too much and want to get out the experience. 

I found myself seriously sweating and gripping my controllers for dear life in some of these videos they are very well thought out for optimal jump scares! 

Absolutely perfect for the scare your friends who are new to VR! And perfect for the upcoming Halloween 🎃 season! At such a small price you’re getting a lot for your cash! 

I played this with Muggito VR & AngleFire in party chat! We all took the plunge together! Although this is single player it’s an amazing way to play with your friends and hear their reactions 🤣 ( make single player games multiplayer with “party chat”)

All said and done absolutely blinding hair raising experience! Highly recommend would love to see some future DLC added I’d happily pay for an added DLC experience! this Dev done good with this app experience! 

Take the white knuckle ride you won’t regret it amazing! 

Amazing jobs devs! 🙌 

Search up Meta Quest VR Gaming Lounge on Facebook for some little snippets and teasers of this app 😜

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the sensational review! We're thrilled to hear you had such an immersive, white-knuckle experience with "VR Horror Stories"! Your feedback and support mean the world to us, and we love the idea of sharing the scares with friends. DLC is definitely in our plans. Happy Halloween!

reviews.review_description: Spatial audio is good and graphics are decent but 2 to 3 min experiences and not scary idk what they was going for on here but fell short a long way sorry 😐 refunding ..keep trying💪🏽

developer_response.body: We understand that horror is subjective, and not every experience will be a perfect fit for everyone. VR Horror Stories is designed as a collection of short, immersive horror experiences with a focus on atmosphere, tension, and spatial audio. While some find them very intense, we know that not every viewer will have the same reaction. We appreciate you giving it a try, and we’ll continue creating the best immersive horror we can!

reviews.review_description:
I recently tried out VR Horror Stories, and let me just say, it was a wild ride! Imagine being thrust right into a scary movie—except I wasn’t just watching; I was *in* it! With 17 chilling 360° videos and some seriously spine-tingling sound effects, I felt like I was living my worst nightmares. 

As the suspense built, I found myself jumping at shadows and clutching my couch like it was a life raft. The best part? No dialogue! Just pure, unfiltered terror! I was free to scream without anyone judging my acting skills. Except that I never screamed. I love Jumpscares so much that they make me laugh. 

The multilingual subtitles were a bonus, so I could scream in English while panicking in every other language! If you’re looking for a good laugh (and a few heart-stopping moments), grab your headset and dive into this collection. Just don’t forget to keep a friend nearby—someone to laugh with when you inevitably freak out! 🎃💀

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the Spooktacular review Miss-Chief!

We're thrilled to hear that *VR Horror Stories* gave you such a wild and immersive experience. It’s always great to hear from fellow horror lovers who enjoy the thrills and chills as much as we do, especially those who can appreciate a good jump scare with a laugh!

Our goal was to create a terrifyingly fun adventure where everyone can feel like they’re the star of their own horror movie, and it sounds like we hit the mark with you.

Thanks again for diving in and for sharing your spooky fun time with us. 

Stay spooky,  

The VR Horror Stories Team

reviews.review_title: Good fun - jumpscares with a time limit
reviews.review_description: So I am not into horror in VR as a preference, because I prefer VR more for leisure and relaxation.  But when a friend suggested I try this, I wanted to be a support.  I am glad I did.  I enjoyed that I got my heart racing, had a few (nervous) laughs, and was able to experience horror in VR with a manageable time limit.  Each horror story tells you the length of the video before you download/play it, so you can sort of peptalk yourself and say "ok, this one is only a minute, I can handle this one."  Hahaha.  Yea, it is a fun experience and I recommend going through it with friends by starting a party chat call and then all pressing play simultaneously.  You cannot move nor control your viewpoint.  The app completely steers you and places you in the space/video where it wants your perspective, so that *and* the music really adds to the suspense of it all.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for giving "VR Horror Stories" a try and for your fantastic review! We're so glad to hear you had fun, even stepping outside your comfort zone! The idea of pacing yourself with the time limits and sharing the experience with friends is exactly what we hoped for. We love that it gave you both a thrill and some laughs! Happy Halloween!

reviews.review_description: I am a horror enthusiast. I love anything horror. This app is good. These shorts are enjoyable. The change that is needed is what others have already said in the comments. Maybe some kind of interaction with whats going on, or maybe something that uses your mic like don’t scream where you hide from whatever, and you can’t make a sound. The stories just need to be better. I agree you are on to something here. Just needs more horror added to the experience. Great experience though. Thanks for all the hard work put into this. Looking forward for more.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review and feedbacks Darkkataclysm. It is appreciated!

reviews.review_description:
The graphics are fantastic! I also love the idea of a library of short horror tales in VR. Sort of like VR CreepyPasta.

That said, these aren’t actual stories, which is really disappointing. I didn’t find them even remotely scary either tbh, but if you’re really easily scared—or my Mom—they might work on you.

DEVS: I think you have incredible potential though and if you teamed up with an experienced horror writer who can craft short, effective stories, you’d really be onto something. Maybe instead of a bunch of short 3 minute vignettes you could craft a really great 10-15 minute horror short. 

Anyway, I wish you luck!

Wide assortment of Storie's very well made that will drive you insane.  Based on actual events. True stories. I believe this to be true. My doctor says I am getting better, but I have lost my medication.

developer_response.body: I am glad you enjoyed "VR Horror Stories".   Thanks for the great review.

reviews.review_description: Even though it's a series of 3d spatial audio 360 videos, I still think it'll be better if it had locomotion or interactions as well. the graphic quality and sounds of the videos are great otherwise.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to write this review and providing us with valuable feedback. It is appreciated.
